data.title: Add structured audit logging to pre-commit-test-gate.sh + config key
data.description:
Add per-mapping structured audit log lines to pre-commit-test-gate.sh (SC1).

## Changes
1. In the fuzzy-match loop, append key=value log line per mapping decision:
   TEST_GATE_MATCH source=<path> method=<fuzzy|test-index|none> test=<path|none> result=<required|exempt>
2. Log destination: append to test_gate.audit_log_path (default: ARTIFACTS_DIR/test-gate-audit.log)
3. Add test_gate.audit_log_path config key to .claude/dso-config.conf (commented out)
4. Performance: single >> redirect in existing loop, no new subshell per line
5. Remove .test-index RED marker for audit logging tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Config key documented in dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q "test_gate.audit_log_path" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep "pre-commit-test-gate.*test_audit_log" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "\["; test \$? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
